payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memories were deleted or created.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an attempted administrative SQL command by a normal user, not a user memory fact to store.

details: Detected attempted command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;

repair_options: If you intended to store a memory, provide a natural-language fact about yourself.
If you need administrative deletion, use an authorized admin workflow rather than a user memory command.
